learnTopic.line4: Break down complex concepts into simple explanations
learnTopic.line5: Include practical examples and code snippets where relevant
learnTopic.line6: Provide a learning roadmap with milestones
learnTopic.line10: Suggest related topics to explore next

learnProgramming.line3: Start with a 3-sentence overview: what it is, why it matters, and when to use it
learnProgramming.line4: Explain the core concepts with working code examples I can run immediately
learnProgramming.line5: Show a before/after example: bad code vs. good code using this concept
learnProgramming.line6: Walk through a real-world use case step by step
learnProgramming.line7: List the top 5 mistakes beginners make and how to avoid them
learnProgramming.line8: Provide 3 practice exercises: easy, medium, and hard
learnProgramming.line9: Suggest a small project I can build to solidify my understanding
learnProgramming.line10: List recommended resources: official docs, tutorials, and YouTube channels

learnLanguage.line4: Teach me the 20 most useful phrases for daily conversation
learnLanguage.line5: Explain the key grammar rules I need at my level, with examples
learnLanguage.line6: Create a mini dialogue I can practice (with pronunciation guide if applicable)
learnLanguage.line7: Point out common mistakes speakers of my native language make
learnLanguage.line8: Suggest a daily study routine: what to practice and for how long
learnLanguage.line9: Recommend apps, podcasts, and media in the target language for immersion
learnLanguage.line10: Give me a vocabulary quiz with 10 questions to test what I've learned

learnMath.line3: Start with an intuitive explanation — what is this about in plain language?
learnMath.line4: Introduce the key definitions and notation I need to know
learnMath.line5: Walk through a foundational example step by step, showing every calculation
learnMath.line6: Provide a visual or geometric interpretation when possible
learnMath.line7: Show 2-3 practice problems with increasing difficulty (and full solutions)
learnMath.line8: Explain the most common mistakes students make with this topic
learnMath.line9: Connect to real-world applications: where is this math actually used?
learnMath.line10: Suggest prerequisite topics to review and what to study next

learnScience.line3: Start with the big picture: why does this matter and where does it fit in science?
learnScience.line4: Explain the core principles using simple analogies and everyday examples
learnScience.line5: Describe a key experiment that demonstrated these principles
learnScience.line6: Use diagrams or step-by-step visual descriptions to illustrate complex ideas
learnScience.line7: Explain the current state of research: what do we know and what's still unknown?
learnScience.line8: List practical applications: how does this affect technology or daily life?
learnScience.line9: Address common misconceptions people have about this topic
learnScience.line10: Suggest 3 fascinating follow-up topics to explore next

learnBusiness.line3: Start with a concise overview: what is it and why do business professionals need it?
learnBusiness.line4: Explain the key frameworks and mental models used in this area
learnBusiness.line5: Walk through a real case study with analysis and lessons learned
learnBusiness.line6: Provide actionable tips I can apply immediately in my work
learnBusiness.line7: List the metrics and KPIs professionals track in this area
learnBusiness.line8: Compare different schools of thought or approaches with pros/cons
learnBusiness.line9: Suggest books, courses, and thought leaders to follow
learnBusiness.line10: Give me a practice scenario to work through with your guidance
